title: sanguisorba lateriflora
intro: Sanguisorba lateriflora, also known as great burnet, is a perennial herb belonging to the rose family (Rosaceae). It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The medicinal properties of Sanguisorba lateriflora include its ability to reduce bleeding, ease digestive problems, and alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections. Sanguisorba lateriflora is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for its health benefits, which may include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system.
